title: May 13
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}
'''May 13''' is the 133rd day of the year (134th in leap years). There are 232 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1923|1923]] – [[Bea Arthur]] is born.
*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Milton Johns]] is born.
*[[1940s#1943|1943]] – [[ABC Television Network]] is founded.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Andy Cunningham]] is born.
*1950 – [[Joe Johnston]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Kirk Thornton]] is born.
*[[1993]] – ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 4]] published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' released for the [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] platform.
*[[2005]] – [[Wikipedia:MTV|MTV]] airs an episode of [[Wikipedia:Total Request Live|''Total Request Live'']] featuring the band [[Wikipedia:Good Charlotte|Good Charlotte]] to promote the upcoming [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']].
*[[2008]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars 6]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Bounty Hunter: Boba Fett]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 5|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 5]] published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The New Republic Vol. 1]]'' published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 5|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 5]] published in Germany.
*[[2017]] – [[John Cygan]] dies.
*[[2025]] – "[[Make It Stop]]", "[[Who Else Knows?]]", and "[[Jedha, Kyber, Erso]]" aired on Disney+.
*2025 – [[The High Republic: Tempest Breaker (script)|''The High Republic: Tempest Breaker'' (script)]] published.
*[[2026]] – [[Shadow of Maul 3|''Shadow of Maul'' 3]] to be published.
<noinclude>
